subcodes.first_line: O wayfarer! Upon thee be My glory, My mercy and My loving-kindness. We bear witness that thou hast turned thy face unto My countenance and hast attained that which was ordained [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا مسافر علیک بهائی و رحمتی و عنایتی نشهد انک اقبلت الی وجهی و فزت بما کان
